title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Parle Products
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
